title: Vibrantly Reimagined
description: A Minecraft Modpack That Vibrantly Reimagines Minecraft Without Losing Quality
body:
**Are you tired of playing the Minecraft the same way, every day?** Then this modpack is for you! It introduces a ton of exploration, boss fights, dimensions and of course crafting. It is fine tuned for the best experience possible and with 230+ mods you are going to be busy exploring this new vast open world solo or with your friends.


<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

Around 230+ with more to be added in future updates..

</details>
